commit.subject: LU-19724 build: v6.18 - d_name/f_path
commit.message:
LU-19724 build: v6.18 - d_name/f_path

v6.17-rc4-6-g180a9cc3fd6a
  make it easier to catch those who try to modify ->d_name

v6.17-rc4-90-g2f7d98f10b8f
    Have cc(1) catch attempts to modify ->f_path

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Shaun Tancheff <shaun.tancheff@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I183eec5977f596810402957d23cc59fa4952451f
